seo.title: SpeakEasy Boxing + Fitness | Boxing Classes & Training in Simpsonville, SC
seo.description: Train like a champ at SpeakEasy Boxing + Fitness. Group boxing classes, personal training, and cross-training workouts in Simpsonville, SC.

lead_magnet.headline: Get Your Free Boxing Fundamentals Guide

review_request.prompt_text: Love your experience at SpeakEasy Boxing? Leave us a review on Google!

services.title: Boxing Classes
services.description: High-intensity group boxing classes designed for all fitness levels. Train with mitts, bags, and partners using traditional and non-traditional equipment.

services.title: Youth Boxing
services.description: Specialized boxing training program for youth ages 8-17. Build strength, technique, and confidence in a supportive team environment.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: One-on-one coaching sessions tailored to your personal goals. Get customized workout plans and expert guidance from certified trainers.

services.title: Cross Training
services.description: Combine boxing with kettlebell, weight training, and conditioning workouts for total body fitness and functional strength.

services.title: Small Group Coaching
services.description: Semi-private sessions for 2-4 people. Perfect for friends, families, or training partners looking for personalized attention.

services.title: Fitness Tracking
services.description: Access cutting-edge technology to track your progress, monitor performance metrics, and stay connected to your fitness goals.

testimonials.name: Maria Santos
testimonials.quote: SpeakEasy Boxing changed my fitness routine. Coach Chris and the team make every class challenging yet accessible. I've never felt stronger!

testimonials.name: James Mitchell
testimonials.quote: The team culture at SpeakEasy is unreal. It's not just a gym—it's a community. The coaches genuinely care about your progress and technique.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.quote: I started as a complete beginner and felt intimidated. But within the first class, I realized everyone was supportive and the instructors adapted everything for my level.

testimonials.name: David Chen
testimonials.quote: Best gym investment I've made. The combination of boxing, cross-training, and incredible instructors makes every session feel fresh and effective.

team.name: Christopher Morphy
team.title: Head Coach & Founder
team.bio: Christopher founded SpeakEasy Boxing in 2019 with a vision to create an accessible and challenging training experience. With years of boxing expertise and coaching experience, he leads the team with passion and dedication to quality training.

team.name: Alex Rivera
team.title: Boxing Instructor
team.bio: Alex brings high energy and technical expertise to every class. Specializing in mitt work and technique refinement, Alex helps members develop proper form and build confidence in the ring.

team.name: Jessica Lee
team.title: Youth Boxing Coach
team.bio: Jessica is passionate about working with younger athletes. She creates a fun, supportive environment while teaching discipline, technique, and the fundamentals of boxing.

faq.question: Do I need boxing experience to join SpeakEasy?
faq.answer: No! Our classes are designed to be accessible and challenging for all fitness levels and skill sets. Whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced boxer, our coaches will tailor the experience to meet you where you are.

faq.question: What are your class schedule and times?
faq.answer: We offer boxing classes Monday-Friday at 6:30 PM and Saturday at 12 PM. Youth boxing classes run Monday, Wednesday, Friday at 4:15 PM and Tuesday, Thursday at 5:00 PM. Contact us for a complete schedule and to book your first class.

faq.question: Do you offer personal training?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer personalized one-on-one coaching and small group training sessions. Contact us to discuss your fitness goals and schedule a session with one of our certified trainers.

faq.question: What equipment do I need to bring?
faq.answer: We provide all the equipment you need including hand wraps, gloves, heavy bags, and more. Just bring comfortable workout clothes and your commitment to training hard!

faq.question: Do you have programs for youth?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Our Youth Boxing program is designed for young athletes to build strength, technique, confidence, and discipline in a supportive team environment. Classes are held multiple times per week with expert instruction.
